query:
-- sync log ล่าสุดของ Boonphone
SELECT id, section, entity, status, progress, current_stage, rows_synced, 
       FROM_UNIXTIME(started_at/1000) as started, 
       FROM_UNIXTIME(finished_at/1000) as finished,
       ROUND((COALESCE(finished_at, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000) - started_at)/1000) as elapsed_secs
FROM sync_logs 
WHERE section = 'Boonphone'
ORDER BY started_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;

-- จำนวน contracts ใน DB แยกตาม section
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total FROM contracts GROUP BY section;
